meaning: adj.头生的(子女),初生的,第一胎生的n.初生儿,长男,长女
examples: A careful reading of the text reveals that most of the firstborn children in the sample were from single-parent homes in which the father was absent.
In one household, a son falls to the ground to mark the Death of the Firstborn.
"The original version" is what Engel calls British English, which is like calling one's firstborn "the original child".
